src: PowerPoint-ist（/'pauəpɔintist/）, An online presentation application that replicates most of the commonly used features of MS PowerPoint, allowing for the editing and presentation of PPT online. Support AIPPT.
ja: PowerPoint風オンラインプレゼンテーションアプリ。MS PowerPointのよく使われる機能を大部分再現し、PPTのオンライン編集・発表が可能。AIPPT対応
